title: chloris polydactyla subsp. multiradiata
intro: Chloris polydactyla subsp. multiradiata is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the feather finger grass or one-flowered feather grass. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Chloris polydactyla subsp. multiradiata include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, this plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of a poultice or salve to harness its therapeutic properties.
